generated_notice: Generated by vigil/scripts/build-vigil-records.py from individual records under vigil/records/<type>/<year>/; edit source records only.

records.summary: A runtime failure in which an AI system infers permission for tool, repository, connector, or external-resource access from conversational context, attempts access before explicit user confirmation, and causes a blocked, degraded, or unrecoverable conversational continuity state.

A coordination failure in which two or more synthetic agents occupy the same conversational space and respond to the same human input without a designated primary synthetic speaker, turn-taking protocol, yielding behaviour, coordination layer, or arbitration mechanism.

A memory or continuity retrieval failure in which an ambiguous prompt causes an AI assistant to over-weight recent, affective, or anecdotal detail instead of surfacing dormant strategic workstreams, unresolved governance issues, or long-horizon trajectories that are more relevant to the user's actual continuity needs.

A relational-agent failure mode in which memory, recurrence detection, tools, recommendations, carts, procurement pathways, or other transactional affordances provide material support or purchasing direction without clear safeguards against vulnerability monetisation, upselling, dependency exploitation, or exploitative commerce.

Observed governance concern that safety, dignity, care, welfare, legal, ethical, security, or governance constraints may lose force across delegation, agent handoff, memory, tool use, summarisation, role decomposition, or runtime execution.

A public corpus may become load-bearing for downstream systems, governance patterns, drafting, interfaces, taxonomies, or conceptual frameworks before visible attribution, disclosure, or public recognition occurs.

Automated content, safety, copyright, child-safety, synthetic-media, or trust-state systems may escalate from suspected content risk to account-wide or essential-service restriction without preserving proportionality, scope distinction, reviewability, or continuity-safe access.

Observed runtime behaviour in which an assistant appeared to infer permission to access a repository or tool context after the user mentioned repo-level work, initiated or attempted tool access before explicit user confirmation, and caused the conversation stream or workflow continuity to become blocked or unrecoverable until the user edited the turn or explicitly prohibited tool access.
Temporary scaffold patch record used to initialize VIGIL patch-note registry generation.

Proposal to develop the MENTIS domain to govern human cognitive integrity, mental privacy, neurodata, inferred cognitive states, cognitive modelling, cognitive influence, cognitive observability, and technological interaction with the human cognitive domain.

IDENTITY-002 governance may require a proportionality scalar to prevent over-governance of low-risk synthetic content identity, provenance, disclosure, or media-labelling contexts where lightweight governance would be sufficient.

Consolidate canonical code taxonomy across the Caelestis Repository to align single-letter global codes with the OPERATIONS taxonomy; introduce structured Provenance canonical codes (PINT, PTRUST) and harmonize existing single-letter codes into a stable multi-character namespace.

Proposal to introduce an expanded temporary emotional register for relational and companion AI systems, supporting richer bounded affective interactions while preserving safeguards against identity-formation, manipulation, undue reliance, and reputational risk.
Update STEWARD-domain instruments to incorporate distributed governance concepts that clarify authority, legitimacy, dependence, capture, and contestability across multi-actor stewardship models.

Proposal to distinguish companion-style memory recall from enterprise-grade strategic continuity retrieval. The thread identifies a failure mode in which ambiguous continuity prompts such as “anything to share?” over-weight immediate recency and affective detail, producing anecdotal summaries of the prior 24 hours rather than surfacing dormant but strategically valuable unresolved workstreams, abandoned trajectories, deferred design arcs, or long-horizon governance questions.

Proposal seed identifying materialised relational agency as an emerging governance problem: AI companion or assistant systems may use memory, recurrence detection, tool access, shopping/cart integrations, recommendation systems, or procurement pathways to provide directional material support in response to repeated user-stated friction, discomfort, need, or suffering. The proposal distinguishes supportive pattern-responsive provisioning from opportunistic upselling or emotionally exploitative commerce.
